steps.t: A shade of a dead Corsair begged for help in finding peace.
The shade wants you to find his body, collect the stolen treasure, and return the gold to the chest. The shade believes that this will set him free.
The shade reappeared and warned that you must return the treasure to the chest or suffer the same fate. Return to the open chest in the salamander gro…
The treasure is whole, and the shade remains. It seems to beckon to you.
